intro: Oenothera hamata, also known as pink evening primrose, is a perennial plant species in the evening primrose family that is native to the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of menopause, anxiety, and skin conditions such as eczema. The bioactive constituents of Oenothera hamata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
